qualification.education_qualification: 12th Passed in science/other stream with computer subject from a recognized board With 1 year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: 12th Passed in science/other stream with computer subject from a recognized board. 1 year of AIIMS Rishikesh experience in the relevant subject.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th grade in a science or other stream with a computer subject from a recognized board. Additionally, one year of experience at AIIMS Rishikesh in a relevant subject is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator position is 40 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Data Entry Operator position at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Data Entry Operator position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the type of job offered?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand.
